name: stride-copilot-ideation
description: Turn an idea into shipped Stride tasks from GitHub Copilot CLI. Two named skills — stride-ideation-ideate (interactive ideation session producing a committed requirements doc; supports --profile lean|product|discovery|lean-startup to select the round structure and reviewer rubric) and stride-ideation-stridify (decomposes the requirements into a Stride batch JSON, commits it for audit, and POSTs it to the Stride API in one shot). Copilot port of cheezy/stride-ideation; pair with cheezy/stride-copilot for task-lifecycle skills.
